title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Wavin India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Wavin India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Wavin India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wavin India:
Wavin India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wavin India!
